---
title: "CIS 351 Final Project"
author: "Carter Altman"
format:
    html:
        embed-resources: true
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(tinytable)
```

# Import Data

```{r}
water_quality <- read_csv("/Users/carteraltman/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-FlaglerCollege/CIS 351 Data Analytics/Final/data_9.csv")

water_quality
```

# Data Cleaning and Preprocessing

```{r}
water_quality <- water_quality |>
  clean_names()

water_quality
```

```{r}
water_quality <- water_quality |>
  mutate(
    turbidity_category = case_when(
      turbidity_ntu < 5  ~ "Low",
      turbidity_ntu <= 50 ~ "Moderate",
      turbidity_ntu > 50 ~ "High"
    )
  )

water_quality
```

```{r}
summary(water_quality)
```

# Descriptive Statistics

## Numerical Variables

```{r}
water_quality_statistics <- water_quality |>
  summarize(
    mean_turbidity = mean(turbidity_ntu, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_turbidity = median(turbidity_ntu, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_turbidity = sd(turbidity_ntu, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_fecal = mean(fecal_coliform_cfu, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_fecal = median(fecal_coliform_cfu, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_fecal = sd(fecal_coliform_cfu, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_chlorophyll = mean(chlorophyll_nu_l, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_chlorophyll = median(chlorophyll_nu_l, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_chlorophyll = sd(chlorophyll_nu_l, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_oil = mean(refined_oil_rfu, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_oil = median(refined_oil_rfu, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_oil = sd(refined_oil_rfu, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_temp = mean(temp_c, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_temp = median(temp_c, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_temp = sd(temp_c, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    .by = site
  ) |>
  tt(theme = "striped")

water_quality_statistics
```

## Categorical Variables

```{r}
table(water_quality$site)
table(water_quality$turbidity_category)
```
